description_long: This is a modern, compact bullpup-style rifle with a striking red and black color scheme, accented by small yellow highlights. The main body is constructed from a robust red polymer or composite material, with black metal components visible on the upper receiver, barrel shroud, and magazine. The rifle features a thumbhole stock integrated into the body, providing ergonomic support and a futuristic appearance. A detachable curved box magazine is inserted behind the grip, characteristic of bullpup designs, and the top rail is fitted with a set of iron sights. The surface shows minor wear and scuff marks, suggesting regular use in urban environments.
description: A compact, red and black bullpup rifle with a thumbhole stock, detachable curved magazine, and iron sights, featuring a modern, robust design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full red body, thumbhole stock, black upper receiver, and curved magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, iron sight alignment, and the compact width of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same red and black color scheme, thumbhole stock, and magazine, with more detail on the ejection port.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock end, sight alignment, and the overall slim profile of the rifle.
